heading: Today
text: Patchy valley fog this morning, otherwise mostly sunny and seasonably warm.  Highs ranging through the 80s.  Winds light, varying from north to west less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with a few high clouds in the St. Lawrence late.  Areas of valley fog, mainly east.  Lows in the upper 50s to mid 60s, warmest through the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.  Winds diminishing to light and variable, turning to the south from the Green Mountains west, less than 10 mph.

heading: Tuesday
text: Patchy valley fog east burning off to some sun.  Thickening clouds, with a rising chance of afternoon showers, mostly west of the Green Mountains.  Quite warm.  Highs in the 80s.  Winds becoming south to southwest 5 to 15 mph.
